content: الرَّاجِل دَه شَكله فَلّاح مِن طَريقَة لِبسُه
translations: eng:that man looks like a peasant because of his clothes

transcriptions.arabizi: ilraagil dah shakl|uh fallaeh min taree'it libs|uh
